title: Leninsk-Kuznetskiy cold snap
lead: A severe cold snap hits Leninsk-Kuznetskiy with a Z-Score of -3.11. The event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The city is experiencing extremely low temperatures, resulting in a significant increase in heating degree days (HDD) at 11.9 GG. 
 The cold snap has led to an increase in energy demand, with no cooling degree days (CDD) recorded. 
 The relative humidity is at 45% with moderate winds of 19.3 km/h.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the effects of the cold snap.
agri_impact: Crops at risk due to frost
